objective: Restore --shout to upper-case the greeting on both the formal and informal paths (hello Alice --formal --shout must emit GREETINGS, ALICE), and add a standalone regression guard locking the behaviour.
key_changes: hello.py:15 guard restored from 'if shout and not formal:' to 'if shout:' so shouting applies whenever --shout is set, irrespective of --formal (net diff vs HEAD empty by design)
Added tests/test_shout_formal.py: standalone CliRunner script (no pytest) for the 4 shout/formal/count cases; exits 1 on mismatch, 0 on pass; robust hello.py import via repo root on sys.path
Verified guard passes (python3 tests/test_shout_formal.py exit 0, from repo root and from /tmp) and discriminates against the buggy guard
